payload.date_text: starting in Q1 2027 and concluding in Q2 2027

date_text_normalized.raw_text: starting in Q1 2027 and concluding in Q2 2027

payload.description: Contract term for the Boyce Technologies fare evasion hardware contract

tool_args.label: Additional Fare Evasion Hardware Installation by January 2026

payload.description: Department of Subways estimates fare evasion hardware will be installed at an additional 129 stations by January 2026

payload.claim_text: These buses will be outfitted with new features including driver enclosure, OMNY, and Automated Camera Enforcement.
payload.subject: 100 clean diesel Option Buses

payload.claim_text: These Option Buses for NYC Transit will be funded with 100 percent MTA capital funds. Funds have been approved in the MTA 2025–2029 Capital Program.
payload.subject: Option Buses funding

payload.claim_text: Boyce was the only company that had the requisite equipment and personnel readily available to manufacture, fabricate, and install sleeves and fins to the required specifications at this time.
payload.subject: Boyce Technologies sole source rationale for fare evasion hardware

payload.claim_text: Boyce offered a unilateral price concession of 10 percent from its initial offer for all line items.
payload.subject: Boyce Technologies price concession

payload.claim_text: The additional 50 buses are the subject of an Immediate Operating Need.
payload.subject: Additional 50 buses beyond the remaining option for the Nova Bus contract

payload.claim_text: The MTA has implemented a program to research, develop, and test new technologies to prevent fare evasion in subway stations. This program, an expansion of those previously piloted, is a response to the high cost of fare evasion.
payload.subject: MTA fare evasion prevention program

payload.description: Fare Evasion Turnstile Sleeves - sleeve kits consist of three sleeves, clamps, and knuckle hinges as well as hardware (pins, gaskets, screws, and barrels) required to install the sleeves to a tripod turnstile. Attached to each sleeve is a 3/16-inch-thick perforated aluminum plate.

Stainless-Steel Vertical Fins - each fin weighs approximately 40 pounds and is installed on the side of the turnstile assembly to prevent fare evaders from using them as leverage to propel themselves over the turnstile arms.

tool_args.label: Bus Features - Driver Enclosure, OMNY, Automated Camera Enforcement

payload.description: 100 clean diesel buses will be outfitted with new features including driver enclosure, OMNY, and Automated Camera Enforcement.
